CONSULTATION PREP
☐ What does success look like for this communication?
☐ Who are the key stakeholders beyond the stated audience?
☐ Are there sensitivities to avoid?
☐ What's the broader context (related initiatives, recent changes)?
☐ What format will be most effective (email, doc, site page)?
☐ What's the real deadline vs. stated deadline?
☐ Will this need iteration or is it one-and-done?

CONTENT EDITING PRINCIPLES:
Headline: Grab attention, teach something (≤10 words)
What's New: Single most important detail (ONE sentence)
Why It Matters: Impact on the reader (1-2 sentences)
Learn More: Links for additional context (optional)
